vocab.meaning: những thứ thiết yếu nhất (không thể thiếu)
vocab.example: I try to travel light, so I usually only carry the bare essentials like my keys, phone, and a slim wallet.

vocab.meaning: những món đồ mang theo hàng ngày (thường với số lượng lớn)
vocab.example: My daily haul often includes a heavy laptop and various chargers, which can be quite taxing on my shoulders.

vocab.meaning: không có đồ đạc lộn xộn, ngăn nắp
vocab.example: I make a conscious effort to keep my bag clutter-free by removing unnecessary receipts and wrappers every evening.
Before leaving the house, I always double-check that all my personal effects are securely stowed in my backpack.

vocab.meaning: các tiện ích có thể mang theo (như nước rửa tay, khăn giấy...)
vocab.example: In this post-pandemic era, portable amenities such as hand sanitizer and a spare face mask have become permanent fixtures in my bag.

vocab.meaning: những món đồ mang tính thực dụng cao
vocab.example: I prioritize utilitarian items over fashion accessories, so you'll always find a multi-tool or a Swiss Army knife in my pocket.

vocab.meaning: chất đầy, nặng trĩu với cái gì đó
vocab.example: On gym days, I am usually laden with a bulky duffel bag containing my sneakers and a change of clothes.

vocab.meaning: trong tầm tay (thuận tiện để lấy ngay)
vocab.example: I keep my Kindle in an outside pocket so that it's always within arm's reach whenever I have a spare moment to read.

vocab.meaning: đồ dùng phù hợp với thời tiết (ô, áo mưa, kính mát...)
vocab.example: Since the weather here is notoriously unpredictable, I always carry weather-appropriate gear like a compact umbrella.
I loathe carrying bulky possessions, so I’ve invested in a very thin smartphone that barely leaves a print in my pocket.
